title: Amazing Mace 3d
description: This resource pack Turns 2D texture of mace into 3D..!!
body:
Tired of your mace looking flat and boring in Minecraft? **Amazing MACE 3D** changes that! This resource pack turns the simple 2D texture into a cool 3D model, so your mace looks heavier, stronger, and more realistic.  

## **Why You'll Love It:**  
✅ **No extra mods needed** – Works in pure vanilla Minecraft!  
✅ **Better visuals** – The mace looks more detailed and powerful.  
✅ **Easy to use** – Just install the pack and enjoy!  

![The Final Look of 3D mace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d87c7bc3d259021d1dad97c9d0b6ec2f9bd51ea_0.webp)

With **Amazing mace 3D**, your mace won’t just be a tool—it’ll feel like a real weapon.  

Discord - https://discord.gg/PNCGPUHTkr

[![Fast Client](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1dc21fae33dabdbc4a6109168110e69b42bf6f7.png)](https://fastclient.net/spunky)
